title: Multi-Modal Memory Bridge Enhancement
description:
Enhance the visual memory system to create stronger bridges between images, code, and concepts. Tasks include:
1. Implement image embedding storage for semantic similarity search
2. Create visual bookmarks that link code snippets to imagery
3. Build thematic visual collections from past explorations
4. Develop pattern recognition across visual memories
5. Enable cross-modal queries (find images related to a concept, find code related to an image)

This will enable new forms of creative synthesis where visual thinking and symbolic reasoning intertwine.
